       Changed = *Off;
       Chain KEYMIN HSG71LR2;

             G71160 <> '00000000';
             EXFMT HS1210W0;
             If Not *In12;

                Update HSG71LR2;
                SetLl KEYG73LF1 HSG73LF1;

                   If G73290 = 0;

                   EndIf;
                   ReadE KEYG73LF1 HSG73LF1;
                EndDo;
                If Changed;
                   Chain KEYMIN HSG71LR2;
                   G71170 = 10;
                   Update HSG71LR2;
                   If isWarrScope(G73140);
                      CallHS1220(G71000:G71050:Update_Swat);
                   EndIf;
                EndIf;
             EndIf;
          EndIf;
